zh.Bramall Hall, Bramhall, Wrenbury, Cheshi: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當William Davenport I於1446年出生在英國爾萊波瑞時，他的父親John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire27歲，母親Cicely de Warren22歲。他於大約1467年與Margery Legh在英國爾普雷斯特波利結婚。他們至少是7個兒子和10個女兒的父母。他去世於1528年4月18日在英國英格蘭爾布拉哈爾享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Davenport I于1446年出生在英国爾萊波瑞时，他的父亲John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire27岁，母亲Cicely de Warren22岁。他于大约1467年与Margery Legh在英国爾普雷斯特波利结婚。他们至少是7个儿子和10个女儿的父母。他去世于1528年4月18日在英国英格兰爾布拉哈爾享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When William Davenport I was born in 1446, in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, his father, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, was 27 and his mother, Cicely de Warren, was 22. He married Margery Legh about 1467, in Prestbury, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 7 sons and 10 daughters. He died on 18 April 1528, in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Davenport I est né en 1446, à Wrenbury, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Cicely de Warren, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Margery Legh environ 1467, à Prestbury, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 7 fils et 10 filles. Il est décédé le 18 avril 1528, à Bramhall, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Davenport I 1446 in Wrenbury, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire 27 und seine Mutter Cicely de Warren 22. Er hat um 1467 in Prestbury, Cheshire, England Margery Legh geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 7 Söhne und 10 Töchter. Er starb am 18. April 1528 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Bramhall, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Davenport I è nato il nel 1446 nel Wrenbury, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Cicely de Warren, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Margery Legh circa 1467, nel Prestbury, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 7 figli e 10 figlie. Morì il 18 aprile 1528, nel Bramhall, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Davenport Iが1446年にイギリスチェシュアイアウレンブリーで生まれた時，父John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquireは27歳，母Cicely de Warrenは22歳であった。約1467年にイギリスチェシュアイアプレストブリーでMargery Leghと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも7人の息子と10人の娘の親であった。彼は1528年4月18日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブラムハルで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Davenport I(이)가 1446년 영국 체실르 런버이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Cicely de Warren(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1467년 영국 체실르 플레스트버이에서 Margery Legh(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 일곱 명의 아들과 열 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1528년 4월 18일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 브램홀에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Davenport I nasceu em 1446, em Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Cicely de Warren, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Margery Legh aproximadamente 1467, em Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 7 filhos e 10 filhas. Ele faleceu em 18 de abril de 1528, em Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Davenport I родился в 1446 г. в местности ренбури, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely de Warren, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Margery Legh около 1467 г. в местности престбури, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 7 сыновей и 10 дочерей. Он умер 18 апреля 1528 г. в местности брамхолл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Davenport I nació en 1446, en Wrenbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Davenport of Bramhall, Esquire, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Cicely de Warren, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Margery Legh aproximadamente 1467, en Prestbury, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 7 hijos y 10 hijas. Murió el 18 de abril de 1528, en Bramhall, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
